summary: Add Student (Agregar alumno) Feature - CRITICAL BUG FIXED AND ALL TESTS PASSED. Fixed Zustand store causing 'Maximum update depth exceeded' infinite loop error. The getAllStudents function was creating new arrays on every render. Changed to use useMemo pattern for combining mock + custom students. All three roles (Teacher, School, Admin) successfully tested with role-specific form field visibility, validation, and student persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: useStudentStore.js was causing infinite re-renders. The getAllStudents method was creating new arrays on every call, triggering React re-renders in a loop when used with Zustand selectors.

Solution: Changed from store method getAllStudents() to useMemo pattern: const customStudents = useStudentStore(s => s.customStudents); const allStudents = useMemo(() => [...TEACHER_STUDENTS, ...customStudents], [customStudents]);

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, all data is MOCKED)

bug_fixed.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded error when navigating to Teacher/School/Admin panels
bug_fixed.root_cause: useStudentStore.js getAllStudents method returning new array on every call, causing infinite re-render loop
fix_applied: Removed getAllStudents method from Zustand store
Changed components to use useMemo: const customStudents = useStudentStore(s => s.customStudents); const allStudents = useMemo(() => [...TEACHER_STUDENTS, ...customStudents], [customStudents]);

test_credentials: No credentials - demo app with role selector

mocked_api.details: Frontend-only prototype with localStorage persistence for new students via useStudentStore

seed_data_creation: None required - uses mockData.js for initial students
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Student feature fully working for all 3 roles. Teacher gets auto-assigned colegio/profesor. School gets auto-assigned colegio but can select profesor. Admin has full control. Students persist in localStorage via Zustand store. Toast notifications via sonner. Modal uses shadcn Dialog components.
